properties.displayName: Block propagating gateway routes on a Route table
properties.description: This policy prevents the propagation of routes to the network interfaces in associated subnets for the route table. Any exceptions should be reviewed by the Global Network Delivery (GND) team.

metadata.description: Audit allows a non-compliant resource to be created, but flags it as non-compliant. Deny blocks the resource creation and update. Disable turns off the policy.
